title: Document requirements for commercial credit memo applications
description: The contract for what each document type must contain, what's required at the application level by loan size, and which extraction schema feeds Landing AI ADE Extract for each doc type. Single source of truth read by document-extractor service + validation gate + UI missing-fields rendering.

10-K.label: Annual report (Form 10-K)
10-K.description: SEC-required annual report for public companies; gold-standard for financial extraction.

10-Q.label: Quarterly report (Form 10-Q)
10-Q.description: SEC quarterly filing; confirms recency + interim trends.

audited_financials.label: Audited financial statements
audited_financials.description: Private-company audited financials; substitute for 10-K when borrower isn't public.

AR_aging.label: Accounts receivable aging report
AR_aging.description: Required for $10M+ loans; drives customer concentration + working-capital analysis.

board_minutes.label: Board minutes
board_minutes.description: Required for $50M+ loans + Reg O insider relationships; surfaces governance + management changes.

appraisal.label: Real-estate / collateral appraisal
appraisal.description: Required when collateral package includes real estate (12 CFR 34); drives haircut math.

business_plan.label: Business plan / projections
business_plan.description: Optional; drives stress-scenario modeling when borrower has thin operating history.

application_completeness._doc: Rules for whether an application has enough documentation to underwrite. Checked by validation gate after Stage 1. Loan-amount-tiered: bigger loans demand more rigor.

minimum_always.reason: Need at least one set of audited annual financials to underwrite any commercial credit

tiers_by_loan_amount.reason: Sub-$10M loans can be underwritten on a single annual financial statement set
$10M-$50M loans require AR aging for customer concentration + working capital analysis
$50M+ loans require recency (10-Q) and AR aging
$200M+ loans require board minutes for governance + Reg O screening + audit-committee findings

collateral_conditional.reason: 12 CFR 34 requires a current appraisal for any real-estate-secured commercial loan

completeness_severity._doc: When required_fields are missing, how aggressive is the action? critical = block underwriting, return application; warning = proceed with degraded confidence; info = log only.

rules.condition: doc_type_required_fields_missing AND any of [revenue, ebitda, total_assets, total_debt, fiscal_year_end]
